'''Carsanza''' was a minor [[Factory world/Legends|industrial world]] located in the [[Carsanza system/Legends|Carsanza system]] of the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]], a part of the [[Senex-Juvex/Legends|Senex-Juvex]] region in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. [[Hyperspace route/Legends|Hyperlanes]] connected Carsanza to the [[Malador system/Legends|Malador]], [[Valorsi system/Legends|Valorsi]], and [[Zyluria system/Legends|Zyluria systems]]. Like the rest of the Senex-Juvex [[Planet/Legends|worlds]], Carsanza was under the control of the region's [[Noble/Legends|aristocratic]] [[Ancient Houses]].<ref name="TEA" />

During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] provided [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] flights to Carsanza.<ref name="Galladinium">''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]''</ref> At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]'' is set during the [[Time/Legends|time]] period between the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], which corresponds to some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the departure of a flight from the spaceport to Carsanza was re-scheduled to an earlier [[Time/Legends|time]] without warning, with the next flight planned for a [[Standard week/Legends|week]] later. [[Mardig]], an individual who was certain he would be fired by his employer if he missed the re-scheduled flight, dashed to the shuttle through the spaceport's terminal atop his [[Mark V14 baggage handler|repulsorlift baggage cart]], boarding the flight within [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]] of lift-off.<ref name="Galladinium" />

==Behind the scenes==
Carsanza was introduced in ''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook written by [[Rick D. Stuart]] and published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Galladinium" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the world in grid square L-17.<ref name="TEA" />
